name: Ground Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and onion, stirring until softened.
3. Stir in the seasoned salt, paprika, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and ground chicken. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a bowl with the chopped lettuce, diced avocado, tomatoes, green onions, olives, cheddar cheese, and jack cheese.
5. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve immediately and enjoy your delicious Ground Chicken Salad.
